extension.description: Rewrite code in VS Code to make typing look productive.
command.selectLookWhileTypingTarget: Look While Typing: Select Working Editor
command.clearLookWhileTypingTarget: Look While Typing: Clear Working Editor
command.scrollLookWhileTypingUp: Look While Typing: Scroll Working Editor Up
command.scrollLookWhileTypingDown: Look While Typing: Scroll Working Editor Down
command.closeLookWhileTypingTarget: Look While Typing: Close Working Editor
configuration.title: Swimming
configuration.shadowRequireShiftForSymbo: Require a symbol character before mapping a symbol in Shadow Rewriting.
configuration.shadowShowInlineSuggestion: Show the current line ghost text in Shadow Rewriting.
configuration.shadowRequireManualLineBre: Require Enter for line breaks and Tab for indentation in Shadow Rewriting.
configuration.lookWhileTypingStepLines: Number of lines to scroll the working editor for each Look While Typing action.
configuration.lookWhileTypingScrollUpKey: Single-character key that scrolls the working editor up in Look While Typing.
configuration.lookWhileTypingScrollDownK: Single-character key that scrolls the working editor down in Look While Typing.
configuration.lookWhileTypingCloseTarget: Single-character key that closes the working editor in Look While Typing.
